    R

    r - Static variable in class RestaurantGame.GenericCustomer
     
    r - Static variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Random variable for this RestaurantModel
    remove(Toppings) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Basket
    Removes the specified ingredient from the basket.
    remove(Toppings) - Method in class RestaurantGame.Oven
    Removes a specific ingredient from the oven if it exists.
    removeFromBasket(Toppings) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    Removes topping from model using removeFromBasket()
    removeFromBasket(Toppings) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Removes topping from basket.
    removeFromOven(Toppings) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    Removes topping from oven in model using removeFromOven()
    removeFromOven(Toppings) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Removes Topping, which is a Patty, from oven, stops cooking it, and adds it to basket.
    RemoveLastTopping() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Burger
    Removes the most recently added topping from the burger.
    reset() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Burger
    Removes all toppings from the burger, leaving it empty.
    resetBasket() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    Clears model's basket
    resetBurger() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    reset the burger
    resetBurger() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Clears burger of toppings.
    resetPerfectAccuracy() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Player
    resets perfect accuracy days count
    resetPerfectTiming() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Player
    resets perfect timing days count
    RestaurantController - Class in RestaurantGame
    CSC 335, Fall 2025 file RestaurantController.java: This class is responsible to controls the game and acess the functions through the RestaurantModel.java file.
    RestaurantController() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
    creates a new controller of the game
    RestaurantGame - package RestaurantGame
     
    RestaurantGUIView - Class in RestaurantGame
    RestaurantGUIView sets up the visual implementation for the Restaurant game.
    RestaurantGUIView() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
     
    RestaurantModel - Class in RestaurantGame
    RestaurantModel provides variables and methods to represent the player for the Restaurant, the current Customers and Tickets for a given day, the various Toppings used to fulfill Tickets, and variables to track the score, timing, income, and milestones for a day.
    RestaurantModel(Player) - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Initializes instance of Restaurant Model.
    ResturantTest - Class in Unit_Tests
     
    ResturantTest() - Constructor for class Unit_Tests.ResturantTest
